_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1 mutation expands an EGFR-dependent peripheral nerve progenitor that confers neurofibroma tumorigenic potential.

_contextSnippet: When cell were plated in EGF together with the EGFR function-blocking antibody Cetuximab, an average of only 4 colonies per well appeared
details: EGFR function-blocking antibody reduced human neurofibroma colony formation to an average of only 4 colonies per well compared to 43 colonies with EGF alone
